textByHash.31c1ef8d33a124895175b7105958a2bd0a3d4da1: You... you've come to free me?
textByHash.d2709678869307d35ae4ac43b3213ade70861fcc: Dark? All I've ever known is darkness. It's all she gave me.
textByHash.0afb4674d30226d6aed8ab11627a840916c745e1: You haven't come to free me at all have you? You're one of her servants!
textByHash.ca12093444854ec9e53c737f79ab0d5c86fe3968: I loved her! She made me! But I couldn't be what she wanted, so she abandoned me! And now she can't bear to kill me herself, so she sends you instead!
textByHash.ddcbdc686548bc1ee9795240b3844ef5eb6e33f6: I won't let you! It's not fair! She doesn't get to do this! I don't want it!
textByHash.490ccd74c44f2719bcb6ec3421a3a4a91e71759b: No! Get out! Get out! Get out!
